'''iQOO All Stars Cup - Season 4''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] {{FlagNoLink|in}} tournament.

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{broadcasterCard
|b1=RA1
|b2=SardarjiYT
|b3=Insane Arena
}}
===Format===
* '''iQOO All Stars Cup - Season 4''' : ''January 22nd - 25th
** 24 teams.
** Squad , {{Abbr/TPP}}.
* ''' Group Stage''' : ''January 22nd - 23rd
** 24 teams.
** 12 invited teams , 12 teams from '''iQOO Community Cup.
** 2 matchdays.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''Grand Finals.
* '''Grand Finals''' : ''January 24th - 25th
** 16 teams.
** 2 matchdays.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 4 teams}} qualify for [[IQOO Pro Series/2024|iQOO Pro Series]]
